steps.title: Evaluate the original function
steps.content:
To find $g(0)$ after a vertical translation, start by finding $f(0)$.
$$f(0)=(0-9)(0-7)(0-5)$$
$$f(0)=(-9)(-7)(-5)$$
$$f(0)=-315$$

steps.title: Apply the translation
steps.content:
Translating the graph up $8$ units adds $8$ to each output value.
$$g(0)=f(0)+8$$
$$g(0)=-315+8$$
$$g(0)=-307$$
The answer is -307.
